query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO team_chat_members (channel_id, user_id, role, joined_at) 
SELECT id, 999, 'member', NOW() 
FROM team_chat_channels 
WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT channel_id FROM team_chat_members WHERE user_id = 999);

SELECT id, 999, 'member', NOW() 
FROM team_chat_channels 
WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT channel_id FROM team_chat_members WHERE user_id = 999);
